calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Post-Judgment Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF HOME VEST CAPITAL LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Post-Judgment Interrogatories. Motion to compel granted 15 days from date order served to file responses. No sanctions as no opposition was filed as required per CCP 2030.290(c). Moving party to submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Post-Judgment Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Continued To Jan-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF HOME VEST CAPITAL LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Post-Judgment Interrogatories is continued to January 30, 2015, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide courtesy copies of its papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Continued To May-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Judgment Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.
Lawrence J. Dreyfuss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Home Vest Capital LLC.
No appearance by defendant China Ellis.
Amended Default entered October 30, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed October 30, 2007.
Order for waiver of appearance of witness at Default Prove-Up hearing filed March 12, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Home Vest Capital LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant China Ellis as follows:

Damages/Principal - $139,600.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,032.04.
Attorney's Fees - $646.25.
Costs $429.88, for a total of $148,708.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Continued To Mar-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Continued To Jan-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
